item.title: I make these Hallmark videos every holiday season, and they get worse every year ?

The first year, circa December 2021
Last year's video, ft. my actual wedding dress
And finally, this year's edition of "What I'd Look Like in a Hallmark Movie"

item.title: Got home from my vasectomy and my wife had all this set up for me.
item.description: She’s always been super funny. I’m going to leave her in a few days (she’s getting older and my “type” is the younger side) but I’ll miss these laughs.

item.dc:creator: MickLeafhill

item.title: His attorney claimed "Freeman and Moss are asking for `the civil equivalent of the death penalty."
item.description: "Giuliani has repeatedly highlighted how he doesn’t have funds to pay his various debts or to respond to the case." “Because Giuliani hasn’t responded to many subpoenas in the lawsuit, attorneys for Freeman and Moss said in court they couldn’t find a number. He’s already been fined more than $200,000 for some of Freeman and Moss’ attorneys’ fees, which he hasn’t paid.” "Giuliani also owed more than $1 million to defense attorneys who’ve helped him on other matters, prompting them to sue him this year, and hadn’t paid nearly $60,000 for years-old unpaid phone bills. Yet at times he’s had help – including from Trump – to try to fundraise to offset some of his debts, and he was able to take a private plane to his arrest on criminal charges related to 2020 election interference in Georgia this summer." "A few months ago, Giuliani listed his 3-bedroom Manhattan apartment for sale. It’s still on the market, for $6.1 million, according to public real estate listings." "It’s also not clear if Giuliani would be able to declare bankruptcy to shield himself from any sum of damages in this lawsuit. That issue, according to people familiar with the case, may have to be decided by the courts at a later time, and it’s possible he could still be on the hook for the award to Freeman and Moss, even if he goes into bankruptcy." https://www.cnn.com/2023/12/15/politics/rudy-giuliani-verdict-pay-defamed-election-workers/index.html
item.dc:creator: MenloPart

item.title: Who is cutting so many onions all at once....
item.dc:creator: redditsauce

item.title: One meme dump in honour of the sweetest cat ever
item.description: This was Sunny, the sweetest little bean ever. He lived for 15 years and saw the best and worst of all our lives. He was there on the mornings of my stepmum and my stepsisters weddings while they were getting ready, for my nephews birth and him starting school, helping me study through major exams, my dad's operation recovery and my brothers graduation to name just a few in the last few years. Sunny looked after my stepmum every day for 15 years, and took care of all of us right up until the end. And sadly today he passed from advanced cancer and dementia. He held on and made sure that everyone, but especially my stepmum, was going to be OK, and he was just the absolute best, you'd never see a more kind and sweet pet. Sunny genuinely sat by her side every single night without fail. He was a true companion through thick and thin, not once leaving anyone's side if they needed him, even if that meant hiding his own pain, and now he can be free. I wouldnt normally put pictures like this on the internet but he deserves a send off fit for a king and everyone should know how amazing he was and what he did for the people around him. You'd always have a true friend in sunny, he stuck by everyone right up until the end. Sunny just wanted everyone to be OK, so I attached some memes to hopefully make you smile
item.dc:creator: Thecheesymemelord

item.title: It's been one week since you adopted me.
item.description:
Took me home in your car and now I'm baby.
Seven days since you paid my fee.
And now I'm on the couch and really sleepy.
I like to roll on the floor and show my belly.
Hi. I'm a really sweet boy and my name's Beverly!
item.dc:creator: Nephelus

item.title: Feijoa are weird
item.description:
A friend of mine gifted me a kilo of feijoa fruit. They're native to South America but these were grown in Oregon and I found out about them from New Zealanders. Raw like this they smell like sunscreen with an undercurrent of wintergreen. Does that sound weird? Well it's likely accurate then because they smell weird.
They're sometimes called "pineapple guavas" but aren't actually guavas though both are from the myrtle family. The flesh does taste a bit like pineapple: similarly tart with some tropical fruitiness. Not bad. Not remarkable.
I decided to make jam but chutney is the other thing my kiwi friends recommended. Peeling and chopping them was kinda tedious but not hard. They naturally have a ton of pectin so sugar and lemon juice were the only additions.
The "sunscreen" aroma that was dominant when raw, diminished with the skins removed, and mostly cooked off. The fruity flavors intensified quite a bit. The result isn't subtle but it is hard to describe. It makes me think of over-ripe strawberries combined with grape soda. And that wintergreen smell I mentioned before is still hanging around.
It jelled up very nicely and is an attractive, amber color. It was pretty interesting but I'm not sure I'd make it again.
item.dc:creator: 4lmonddragon

item.title: While our congress screws balks at sending more arms to Ukraine...
item.description:
Okay, math quiz: Which is a higher price? A few billion in arms for Ukraine or the life of ONE American soldier (among thousands!) who would be fighting in Europe when Putin (as he has already stated) attacks the Balkans, Germany, and the rest of NATO? Now call and or write your congressmen and senators and tell them what you figured out (and what those morons already know, but don't care about). Demand that we continue to support Ukraine as they defend Europe and their own sovereign nation.
Sorry for the messed up title. Tired and sick this week...
item.dc:creator: SonsofLibertyArise

item.title: Images of Note: shillelagh it is!
item.description:
Where you gonna get the Plutonium tho?
You are NEVER safe from Waluigi
sudo apt-get to the gym!
Oh no
I don't trust people who go all out for christmas.
Yeah that ending was a gut punch. Not many sitcoms end with the characters all dying like this.
uwu
Bonk
This is why people like mechanical keyboards.
BONK
If you have seen the video you know what I mean.
This was what it was like in Scotland when the Nintendo Wii dropped.
They're talking about the Galve Goat btw. EAT THE GOAT!!!
This is how you deal with right wing fuds.
YOU CAN TAKE HALLOWE'EN FROM MY COLD DEAD SECULAR HANDS!
There's a reason why you can run Linux on a dead badger.
Transvestigation people are fucking wild and lack any real awareness of the human body's variety.
Femboy care package
HELL YEAH
When I started HRT I started crying to music.
wheek wheek wheek wheek wheek wheek wheek wheek wheek wheek wheek
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also BGABGMS is down right now thanks to Discord so if you're a part of the memedump notification club and see this, please post it there, I might be asleep.
